name: Push & Power

exercises.name: DB flat bench press
exercises.tip: Full ROM — touch chest, lock out at top. Drive feet into floor.

exercises.name: DB incline press
exercises.tip: Bench at ~30°. Keep elbows at 45° angle from torso.

exercises.name: Standing DB overhead press
exercises.tip: Brace core hard. Don't flare ribs at lockout.

exercises.name: DB lateral raise
exercises.tip: Lead with elbows, slight forward lean. Pause briefly at the top.

exercises.name: DB skull crusher
exercises.tip: Lower to temples, not forehead. Keep upper arms vertical.

exercises.name: Medicine ball push-up
exercises.tip: One hand on the ball, one on the floor. Alternate sides each set.

progression: Once 3 × 8 (or top of rep range) feels solid with clean form, add the next dumbbell increment on your next session.

name: Pull & Build

exercises.name: Chest-supported DB row
exercises.tip: Incline bench at ~45°. Pull elbows past torso, squeeze at top.

exercises.name: Single-arm DB row
exercises.tip: Brace against bench. Let shoulder blade protract at the bottom.

exercises.name: Band pull-apart
exercises.tip: Arms straight, pull to full stretch. Slow the return — don't snap back.

exercises.name: DB rear delt fly (prone on bench)
exercises.tip: Lie face-down on incline bench. Lead with elbows, not hands.

exercises.name: Incline DB curl
exercises.tip: Arms hanging on incline bench — maximizes bicep stretch at the bottom.

exercises.name: DB hammer curl
exercises.tip: Neutral grip hits brachialis and brachioradialis — adds arm thickness.

progression: Once 3 × 10 rows feels controlled with no momentum, increase weight. For band exercises, slow the tempo before adding resistance.

name: Squat Focus

exercises.name: Goblet squat
exercises.tip: Hold one heavy DB at chest. Elbows inside knees at bottom. Drive through full foot.

exercises.name: Bulgarian split squat (DB)
exercises.tip: Rear foot elevated on bench. Front shin stays vertical. Lower slowly — 3 seconds down.

exercises.name: DB step-up (bench)
exercises.tip: Drive through the heel of the working leg. Don't push off the trailing foot.

exercises.name: DB Romanian deadlift
exercises.tip: Soft knee, hinge at hip. Feel hamstring stretch before driving hips forward.

exercises.name: Medicine ball slam
exercises.tip: Full extension overhead, violent exhale on the slam.

progression: Bulgarian split squats are the priority — add load here first. Once 3 × 8 per leg is clean, add weight.

name: Hinge & Drive

exercises.name: Single-leg DB RDL
exercises.tip: Slight bend in standing knee. Hinge until deep hamstring pull — don't chase depth with a rounded back.

exercises.name: DB hip thrust (bench)
exercises.tip: Upper back on bench, DB across hips. Full glute squeeze at lockout.

exercises.name: Band pull-through
exercises.tip: Anchor band low, hinge back, drive hips through.

exercises.name: Medicine ball squat jump throw
exercises.tip: Squat holding ball, explode up and release overhead. Absorb landing softly.

exercises.name: Single-leg calf raise (DB)
exercises.tip: Stand on edge of a step if possible. Full range — don't bounce at the bottom.

progression: Single-leg RDL is the anchor — once 4 × 8 per leg is controlled and balanced, add weight.
